nasb.text: He who says to the wicked, “You are righteous,” Peoples will curse him, nations will abhor him;

esv.text: Whoever says to the wicked, “You are in the right,” will be cursed by peoples, abhorred by nations,

cnv.text: 對壞人說“你是好人”的， 萬民都要咒罵他，萬族都必憎惡他。

ccb.text: 判恶人无罪的， 必遭万人咒诅， 为列国痛恨。

csbs.text: 谁要是对恶人说“你是义人”， 万民就咒骂他，万族就恼恨他；
